feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Gateway (OData)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Gateway (OData) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAPUI5 PDFViewer Not Working : Underlying iframe was not found in DOM.
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently working on a SAPUI5 application that needs to display a PDF from the ABAP backend.

The OData Service is OK. Tests with Gateway Client are positive.
Just one point : I had to adapt the content-disposition to pass ‘inline’ instead of 'attachment' on ABAP system (SEGW)
>>> In order to display my PDF in the SAPUI5 application and no longer download it.

Now, I'm encountering another error in my SAPUI5 application
>>> FYI My SAPUI5 Version is "1.120.0"

The PDFViewer say "The PDF file could not be loaded."
And in the console I see the error message "Underlying iframe was not found in DOM."
My OData request is OK. The problem seems to be with my SAPUI5 application.

The code is relatively basic.
A PDFViewer on a view with setSource and setVisible, I also tried with Open method but same error.

I found the SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3429273/E but the properties "isTrustedSource" does not seem to be available with my version of SAPUI5 ("1.120.0").

I also tested my application with SAPUI5 version"1.120.20" on SAP BAS, In this case, I receive the message "Download the file to view it".
>>> Downloading works well, but that's not the purpose of the application.

How can I display the PDF content directly in the application?
In my case, downloading is not an option ...

Thanks in advance for your help.
YouriC

entry.title: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content:
hi,

I need to create a table that takes a structure that I created in SE11.
I used the Occors command:

DATA: gt_test LIKE ZTEST OCCURS 1000.

what can I use instead of occurs?

thank you

entry.title: Manage Purchase Order App with Extended CDS with Field Control
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We have been extending the Manage Purchase Order App by Extending the underlying Items CDS Views. Whole manage Purchase Order was designed and Deployed with BOPF. Due to limitations we have been using this approach by Extending the CDS Views. 

1. I see the newly extending field in SEGW and App 

2. now based on certain fields I need to enable and disable the field- for this I have been using the Fieldcontrol BADI . However in the field Control Purchase Item BADI , it is not showing the Extended field to control. 

I see the Custom Field Fields based out of Business Context , however not the Extended Field with underlying CDS. 

Does anyone face this kind of limitation with Field Control BADI on PO or any other applications. 

 

Thanks and Regards,

Bharani

entry.title: BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE is working in SE37 but is only partially working through program
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

This is my first post so I might not come across very clearly. Please bear with me.

I am using 'BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE' to create a PR in EBAN table, which also contains ADRNR/ADRN2 fields.

My requirement states that the ADRNR/ADRN2 field should get auto-generated in the record once the BAPI is executed, and I will then update the same ADRNR into ADRC table manually.

I read that the prerequisite for this requirement is that the REQUISITION_ADDRDELIVERY structure should be populated, and I am doing the same.

However, once the BAPI is executed through my program, the PR is generated with empty ADRNR/ADRN2 fields. If I execute the same BAPI through SE37 using the same inputs, the ADRNR field is being populated.

Any ideas on where I might be going wrong?

Thank you

entry.title: Error CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST API
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am getting error "CSRF Token Validation Failed" in POST API. 

I am able to generate CSRF token successfully through below code. But seems token is not getting set hence getting the above error. 

Please suggest where I am doing wrong. Also, I am able to post successfully via POSTMAN with same data and Basic Authentication.

Many Thanks

DATA(lv_string) = cl_web_http_utility=>encode_base64( lv_Str ).

 

lv_string = |Basic { lv_string }|.

** Set up header fields for getting X_CSRF-TOKEN

DATA(lo_request2) = lo_http_client->get_http_request( ).

lo_request2->set_header_fields( VALUE #(

( name = 'Content-Type' value = 'application/json' )

( name = 'X-CSRF-Token' value = 'fetch' )

( name = 'Authorization' value = lv_string )

 

 

) ).

 

CONCATENATE i_url1 '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_MAINTNOTIFICATION/MAINTENANCENOTIFICATION' INTO i_url2.

lo_request2->set_uri_path( i_uri_path = i_url2 ).

DATA(lv_response2) = lo_http_client->execute( i_method = if_web_http_client=>get )->get_header_fields( ).

READ TABLE lv_response2 INTO DATA(ls_repsonse2) WITH KEY name = 'x-csrf-token'.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

DATA(lv_token) = ls_repsonse2-value.

CLEAR ls_repsonse2.

ENDIF.

 

IF lv_token IS NOT INITIAL.

 

** Set CSRF Token

lo_http_client->set_csrf_token( ).

 

 

" Navigate to the resource and create a request for the create operation

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'MAINTENANCE_NOTIFICATION' )->create_request_for_create( ).

 

 

ENDIF.

entry.title: Camera Captured image from SAPUI5 to SAP DMS Folder, Could not able to view the image
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

i have added custom camera button to capture image from Fiori app and sending to Odata service to create the image in SAP DMS.

Backend code:

Image is getting created successfully but when i try to open getting the below error

Please help to identify the issue.

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content:
hi,

i added a custom field in append in RIHAFVR structure.

But when i launch transaction IW47 the field is not displayed in alv.

How can i display the field?

 

thank you

entry.title: how to read RSTXT-TXLINE field
entry.content:
Hi,

inside the RIAFRU20 report enanchment I have to read the RSTXT-TXLINE field 

 

I have already tried the FM READ_TEXT but it wants the "Name" as input, I don't know the "Name" inside the enhancement 

how can i do?

entry.title: How to append an existing custom structure to a standard table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a custom structure and I need to add it in append inside a standard table.

but if I click the "Append structure" button it tells me that the structure already exists:

I don't want to create the structure, because it already exists, but I just need to add it to the standard table. How can I do that?

 

thank you

entry.title: Create CDS Entity in system 2 based on table in system 1
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are looking to create a CDS entity in system 2 based on data present in system 1. This entity in system 2 will be used by PaPM tool in system 1 for further processing, based on the following requirement:

In system 1, PaPM team are trying to build a solution, but the source data is present in system 2. Source data is too huge, and filters applied via PaPM in system 1 aren't working effectively. We are looking to create CDS entity in system 2, based on the filters maintained in system 1 (which is an ABAP table), so that PaPM can use the CDS created in system 2 as a source with less number of fields. 

We tried the following options, but they don't fit our requirement:

1. Custom entity and ABAP interface (Custom entity can't be used for data fetch and can be used for RAP framework only, so couldn't go further)

2. Entity with Virtual data elements (Entity doesn't reflect the values calculated via Virtual data elements, unless used in Odata/RAP, which doesn't meet our requirement.)

Is there any way to achieve this? 

I see one way is to create the filter table in system 2, and create CDS in system, but this requires efforts in building an Fiori app based on RAP framework (for user input), Odata (for excel upload) and UI5 coding.

Thanks & Regards,

Naga

entry.title: No Where-Used List for the Authorization Object in SE80/SU21 after S/4 HANA 2023 Upgrade
entry.content:
After the system upgrade from S/4 HANA 2021 to S/4 HANA 2023, the Where-Used List for authorization objects in SE80/SU21 disappeared.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Same profile naming in development and quality systems
entry.content:
Hi,
SHD an SHQ were our development and quality systems, but now, we have a new system:
SDH (development system)
SQH (quality System)
So, when we created new role and a new profile is assigned automatically in old systems, this profile name was T-SDxxxxxx (DEV) and T-SQxxx (QAS) respectively.
Now, when we create new roles and profiles automatically in new systems, the profile name begins with same nomenclature T-SHxxxx and it is generating incidents.
Could you please help us with this issue?
Is these any OSS Note to apply? or could you tell us how change the beginning of the profile name T-YYxxxxx?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Count parameter in an Odata v4 service, using RAP, doesn't work
entry.content:
Dear experts and 

I've facing a strange error when testing the corresponding authorities-checks using DCL on a CDS view, and its corresponding oData service.

Giving a context, I've created a view root view, its projection view and access control. Then I've published its projection view in a service definition and service binding. In both objets, entity view and projection view, I've changed the @AccessControl.authorizationCheck to #CHECK

When I filter the entity by a certain value, it doesn't return any value, as it's not included the user authority-check. So, it's right.

However, when I apply the parameter count to the same URL, it returns the value "2". I've already cleaned its cache in the tcode /IWFND/V4_ADMIN, but I still have the same issue. 

Please, I would appreciate if you could help me with this problem.

Best regards,

 

 

Rogerio

entry.title: Filter on multilevel Expand odatav4
entry.content:
I have multiple level entities Order header/Item/Schedule.

I am trying to filter based on 'specific time' which is at schedule line level and material at item level and sold to at header. material, sold to filter works, But I am getting orders headers and items for which there are no schedule lines at all. My requirement is that if there are no schedule lines for time greater than given specific time , the order header and item should also be not displayed .

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/****/0001/SalesOrderHeader?$expand=_OrderItem($filter=Material eq '**';$expand=_OrderSchedule($filter=Time ge 2024-09-13T23:59:59Z))&$filter=(SoldToParty eq '****' and _OrderItem/any(s: s/Material eq '*******')

Request you to help me with the right filter and expand options

entry.title: BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE not updating WBS element
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently working on a development that requires me to create a new PR and update the WBS element based on user input. I am using the BAPI BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE to do the same.

The BAPI runs successfully and all fields are created/populated except for the WBS element.

Please find some of my code snippets below:

l_it_praccount TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapiebkn.   "Table Declaration

APPEND VALUE #( "res_doc = abap_false   "Populating Data
                      g_l_acct = <fs_deep>-sakto
                      preq_item = <fs_deep>-bnfpo
                      cost_ctr = <fs_deep>-kostl
                      wbs_elem = <fs_deep>-ps_psp_pnr   "WBS Element
                      distr_perc = <fs_deep>-vproz
                       )  TO l_it_praccount.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_REQUISITION_CREATE'   "Passing Table to BAPI
            EXPORTING
              skip_items_with_error          = abap_true
              automatic_source               = abap_true
            IMPORTING
              number                         = lv_number
            TABLES
              requisition_items              = l_it_pritem[]
              requisition_account_assignment = l_it_praccount[]   "Table Mapping
*             REQUISITION_ITEM_TEXT          =
*             REQUISITION_LIMITS             =
*             REQUISITION_CONTRACT_LIMITS    =
*             REQUISITION_SERVICES           =
*             REQUISITION_SRV_ACCASS_VALUES  =
              return                         = lt_return[]
*             REQUISITION_SERVICES_TEXT      =
              requisition_addrdelivery       = l_it_item[]
*             EXTENSIONIN                    =
            .

Any ideas on where I might be going wrong?

Thank you.

entry.title: how to read fields of structures
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

inside a custom report, I need to read some fields that are present in these structures:

 

AFVGD
AFRUD
CAUFVD
VIQMFE
RIWO00
VIQMUR

 

since they are structures, I can't do a Select, are there tables that I can use that are connected to these structures? Or are there Function Modules?


Thank you!

entry.title: How to monitor the usage of OData V4 services in the system?
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if there is any report that tracks the usage of OData V4 services which are consumed in fiori apps? Is there a way to monitor the usage of Fiori apps built on Odata V4 services?

entry.title: How to save Odata data in SAP BUILD APP in PDF format.
entry.content:
I am created a project in SAP Build App and data in coming from Odata link in UI also.
Now, I want to save that data in PDF format.

entry.title: Fiori mobile application direct print
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I have a odata service which returns bar code as raw string. I want to utilize it as direct print in my fiori screen without downloading in my mobile device.

NOTE : my odata service in xtream format 
( /sap/opu/odata/sap/ZMM_GRN_PROCESS_SRV_01/GRNPDFSet(PoNumber='')/$value )

Please put your thoughts.

entry.title: Missing OData Service BankStatementPost_In in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to activate the OData Service BankStatementPost_In in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE but I cannot find it. Release is S4HANA ON PREMISE FPS01 2022. To my understanding, according to business Documentation, this Service should be available in this Release.

Thank you for your help
